description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this blue backpack from adidas. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accommodate everything you think of.MeasurementHeight: 17"Width: 12"Depth: 6"Made of polyester and polyurethane for enhanced durabilityTwo roomy compartments with a detailed organizer and an inner compartmentTwo smaller zippered pockets on the front for enhanced spaceBrand name with the adidas patented 3-Stripes printed on the frontHaul loop for handling easeTwo mesh bottle holders on either sideSide adjustable straps with a click clasp to customise sizePadded, adjustable shoulder straps with mesh that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries and gives you breathable comfortErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy useNylon bonded thread for long lifeCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
